details.IncidentDetail: "[39] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 WIEBE TRUCK'N 707-334-1125"
"[37] [Notification] [CHP]-LL WIEBE TRUCK'N IN TOW WITH A VEH IN HAYFORK NOW AND HEADED TO WEAVERVILLE - THEN CAN BE ENRT - CONFIRM ETA IS C4? "

"[36] DISPATCH - "Thank you. I will work on getting a tow truck started to you. If you would like to disconnect from satellite now, you can go get warm in your vehicle as long as you feel safe doing so. Our officers are going through Hayfork now.'"
"[35] "Can I please go to vehicle to get warm""
"[34] C90-013 INQ IF 1185 WAS STARTED "
"[31] DISPATCH - "Since you have funds, I will start you a tow truck. Is there a specific destination you would like to be towed to?""
"[29] DISPATCH RESPONDED - "Okay, you do not have to answer whether you have AAA or not. However, would you like me to start you a tow truck that will need to be paid out of pocket by you?:"

"[27] DISPATCH TEXT BACK - "It is not irrelevant. I do have officers on their way to you and they have been en route to you for a while. How is your vehicle going to be removed from the middle of the roadway without a tow truck? I will need to start a tow truck along with our officers.""
"[25] My car is in the middle of the road on a blind corner. Whether I have money for a tow or AAA is irrelevant because the vehicle is blocking the road"
"[24] INQING AGAIN WITH THE INVLVD IN REGARDS TO A TOW "
"[17] RP DID NOT ANSWER INQ ABOUT 1185 "
"[12] INQING WITH INVVLD ON 1185 INFO "
"[11] CORR L 9 -- 1 MILE JNO FOREST SVC ROAD 1S07 "
"[9] 1 MILE JSO FOREST SVC ROAD 1S07 "
"[6] WITH STROBE LIGHTS ON TO WARN APPG VEHS "
"[2] CAR DIED IN THE MIDDLE OF THE RDWY "
"[11] GCSO LL INQ ETA // ADVSD OPD 97 // NEG UPDATES"
"[9] 1039 GCSO TO STAGE 1141 "
"[7] RP 1023ING BEHINS VEH W/ HAZARDS ON"

"[7] B103-014 VEH 1125 NB LANE // 1185 ENRT W/ 45 MIN ETA"
"[3] WILL BE STARTING 1185 3A "
"[2] OFF RDWY "
"[1] WHI TOYT HGH PART 1125 "
